title: Certainty EORM Data
subtitle: GSM8K-Llama3 Chain-of-Thought training and test data for EORM
description: Pre-processed GSM8K training and testing datasets generated by Llama 3 for Energy Outcome Reward Model training. Each JSONL line contains a question, label (0/1), and generated chain-of-thought text.

resources.description: Training data: ~30K lines, 4 candidates per question
Test data: ~5K lines, 4 candidates per question
